race.comment: Siding with CONCORD CONNIE (8) who comes here off a very smart maiden win at Pakenham, sent out at $1.40 having started $1.60 on debut last time in, running slick overall time there to win by two lengths. She should relish 1400m off that and if she can get into the running line from a wide draw she'll be launching. CAFE AU LAIT (4) comes through the best race on paper having stuck on well in a 3yo handicap here behind Exit. The win prior was dominant, she'll take beating again. Very wary of CARRIEDO (6) who has won two in a row, backing up the maiden victory with a dominant display at Sandown Lakeside. She looks very progressive while COOLY (7) was well backed to win a BM62 at Pakenham last time and could measure up.
